# Baseline Refit Report — Event-Aware

*Generated by `baseline.refit`. The v2 baseline excludes any hour that falls within an event's ±3h window from the median-input pool. Federal holidays remain excluded as in v1.*

*Negative `median_delta` means the v2 baseline dropped after excluding event hours — i.e., event hours had been inflating the naive median. The bigger the drop, the more contaminated v1 was.*
